creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: I have merged the change that I believe should fix this back to stable/10.  I do not plan on merging this to 9.x, and I do not plan on trying to get this into 10.1 as an EN.  It should be present in 10.2 when that is released.  Please reopen if this fix does not work for you when you test it.
